result.stdout:
DevDB  version 0.4.1

Usage:
  devdb reset <CONNECTION_STRING> [options]     Resets specified DB and recreates it from scripts
  devdb migrate <CONNECTION_STRING> [options]   Applies all available migrations to specified DB
  devdb help                                    Opens GitHub URL with detailed help

Options:
  -db <DB_TYPE>      Specifies DB engine type: 'mssql' or 'pgsql' (default is 'mssql')
  -p <TARGET_PATH>   Specifies custom target path (current folder will be used by default)
  -s                 Performs "soft" reset by dropping and recreating only procedures, types, functions, and views.
                     Does not reset tables, schemas, users, roles, etc. or anything related to modifying the data.
                     Applies only to 'reset' command.
  -y                 Automatically submits 'yes' to all Y/N prompts
  -v                 Enables verbose output
